title: Combobox
description: Autocomplete text input with static or async suggestions. Supports free values (combobox) or strict selection (autocomplete).

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Static suggestions shown as the user types.

freeSolo.title: Free solo (creatable)
freeSolo.desc: Type a new value and press Enter. The dropdown stays open so you can see the option being added to the list. The \@change handler detects unknown values and pushes them into the reactive options array.

strict.title: Strict (autocomplete)
strict.desc: With free-solo set to false, only values present in options are accepted.

async.title: Async search
async.desc: Pass loadOptions to resolve options from a backend with debounce.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes for different UI densities.

props.options: Static options list. Ignored when loadOptions is defined.
props.loadOptions: Async options source called on every query change.
props.debounce: Delay in ms before calling loadOptions.
props.minChars: Minimum characters before triggering the async search.
props.freeSolo: Allows any text as value. If false, only valid options are accepted.
props.label: Visible label above the field.
props.errorText: Error message that replaces the helperText.
props.emptyText: Text shown when there are no options to display.
props.loadingText: Text shown while the async search is in progress.
props.color: Semantic color for focus and accent.
props.clearable: Shows an X button to clear the value.
props.fullWidth: Applies w-full to the root control.
props.iconLeft: Icon on the left side of the input.
props.name: HTML name attribute for form submission.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the input value changes.
emits.change: Emitted after selecting an option or confirming text.
emits.select: Emitted when an option is chosen from the list.

types.title: Combobox
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Combobox component props. Uses SelectOption for its options array. See the Select page for the option shape.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbType: Filter the option list by typing
a11y.kbEsc: Close the dropdown panel without selecting
a11y.ariaExpanded: Communicates whether the dropdown panel is open or closed
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true when errorText is present
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links helper or error text to the input for screen reader context
a11y.ariaRequired: Set to true when the required prop is active
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name when no visible label is present
a11y.focusNative: Uses a native input element — participates in the tab order by default
a11y.focusTrap: Focus is trapped inside the dropdown panel while it is open
